title: Poké Discs
description: Craftable Music Discs from the Pokémon games series!
body:
This combo data & resource pack adds craftable music discs of songs from the mainline Pokémon game series!

## Features
- **Over 60 craftable Music Discs from the first 4 generations of Pokémon, with even more planned in future updates!**
- **New advancements to track your progress for each game collection!**
- **Compatibility with the Cobblemon mod!**

## Version Differences
There are two versions of this data pack: Cobbled Version and Vanilla Version. Each version has their own requirements:
- Cobbled Version is made for Minecraft 1.21.1 and requires the Cobblemon mod
- Vanilla Version is made for the most recent Minecraft release (1.21.9 as of this pack's upload)

## Recipes
If you're having trouble discovering the recipes for each music discs, [please check out this spreadsheet.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1fYHH0CumQ30sgKH5MbXsL6ouVzAByz-m4RF_2e5C3cU/edit?gid=339424248#gid=339424248)

## Install & Update Instructions
To install the pack, place the zip file in both the resourcepack folder and your world's datapack folder. When updating, simply replace the zip file in each file location. It's recommended you install this data pack after world creation so you can install updates easier
